promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💸 Zero handling fees on first remittance to Chinese Mainland with funds arriving as fast as 1 hour
promotions.description: First-time remitters to Mainland China can enjoy zero handling fees using Airstar Bank App's 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' service. Transfers can be received in as little as 1 hour, making it a fast and cost-effective option for sending money to Mainland China.
promotions.quota: One-time offer per customer. Limited quota, first come, first served.

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher when activating Money Safe
promotions.description: Customers who deposit any amount into a 'Money Safe' account will receive a complimentary HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher. Money Safe is an anti-fraud feature that provides enhanced protection while still earning the same interest rates as regular Savings/Time Deposit accounts.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served

promotions.title: Travel With Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD800 cash rebate on airline ticket purchases
promotions.description: Visa cardholders can earn cash rebates when using their Registered Eligible Visa Card to book air tickets with Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR or Singapore Airlines through their official Hong Kong or Macau websites. Rebates range from HKD240 to HKD800 based on transaction amount.
promotions.quota: Maximum HKD800 cash rebate reward once per eligible Visa cardholder
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD4,000 for HKD240 rebate; HKD8,000 or above for HKD800 rebate

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 🏦 24/7 instant bank securities transfers in HKD, USD, and CNY
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers round-the-clock bank securities transfer support for HKD, USD, and CNY with instant arrival of funds. This service enables customers to move their securities between accounts without delay, regardless of the time of day.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 💎 $0 commission forever on Hong Kong stock trades
promotions.description: Eligible accounts can enjoy zero commission on Hong Kong stock trades for life. The promotion applies to accounts opened during a specific promotion period, with eligibility being permanently retained once qualified. For US stocks, commissions are just US$1.99 per order.
promotions.period: Limited time promotion with no expiration for eligible accounts
promotions.quota: Limited to accounts opened during promotion period (based on system-recorded time)

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 5 minutes via mobile
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers a streamlined mobile account opening process that can be completed in as little as 5 minutes. This service is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors physically present in Hong Kong, requiring only a mobile phone.

promotions.title: No Account Management Fees
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero account management fees and no minimum deposit requirements
promotions.description: Airstar Bank accounts come with no account management fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. This zero-fee structure makes banking accessible to all customers regardless of their account balance or financial status.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💵 Personal loans with approval and disbursement in as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers personal loans with a streamlined application process that can be completed in as little as 5 minutes from application to loan disbursement. Loans are available for up to 12 times the applicant's monthly salary with personalized APRs ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 💱 Multi-currency savings with no minimum balance requirement
promotions.description: Airstar Bank provides savings accounts supporting multiple currencies with no minimum balance requirement. Customers can hold and manage different currencies in a single account, offering flexibility for international transactions and currency diversification.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: 🕰️ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Customers can place time deposits at any time with Airstar Bank's 24/7 service. The bank offers flexible tenor options to suit different financial needs and time horizons, allowing customers to maximize their interest earnings based on their preferred investment duration.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ 24/7 instant transfers in multiple currencies including via FPS
promotions.description: Airstar Bank supports transfers in multiple currencies (HKD, USD, CNY, etc.) with 24/7 instant transfer capability for HKD and CNY via FPS. Customers can transfer funds using mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers for convenient money movement.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 📈 Low-fee instant trading with fractional shares and global access
promotions.description: Airstar Bank provides a stock trading platform with low fees for both Hong Kong and US markets. The service includes support for fractional shares, allowing customers to invest with smaller amounts and gain global market access.

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investing
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Invest in stocks with as little as 1 share for HK or US$5 for US markets
promotions.description: Airstar Bank allows customers to invest in fractional shares, starting with just 1 share for Hong Kong stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks. This feature makes it possible to invest in high-priced securities with a smaller capital outlay, enabling portfolio diversification for all investors.
promotions.cost: Minimum investment of 1 share (HK) or US$5 (US)

promotions.title: 24/7 Online Banking Services
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Round-the-clock digital banking access and customer hotline
promotions.description: Customers can access Airstar Bank's online banking services 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. This includes a 24-hour customer hotline service for support at any time, offering complete banking convenience regardless of time constraints.

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payment transactions
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This security feature continuously monitors transactions to detect and prevent fraudulent activities, providing cardholders with enhanced payment protection.

promotions.title: Money Safe Anti-Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced protection against fraud while earning interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses. Secure your funds while still earning Savings or Time Deposit rates, with funds only unlockable through in-person appointment.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open an Ant Bank account in as fast as 3 minutes. This streamlined process makes it quick and convenient to become an Ant Bank customer and access their services.

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Receive up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on first loan withdrawal
promotions.description: SME loan customers can enjoy up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on their first loan withdrawal. This is a limited-time promotion specifically targeted at small and medium enterprise customers applying for business loans.
promotions.cost: Must apply for and withdraw an SME loan

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Savings account now supports HKD, RMB, and USD currencies
promotions.description: Ant Bank has upgraded their savings account to support multiple currencies including Hong Kong Dollar, Renminbi, and US Dollar. Customers can now enjoy the convenience of managing different currencies in one account.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Platform with Low/Zero Commission
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Moving towards zero commission trading for securities
promotions.description: Ant Bank is offering a special promotion moving towards zero commission for securities trading. This limited-time offer allows customers to trade securities with reduced or eliminated commission fees.

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Insurance plan with up to 3.6% annual rate
promotions.description: Ant Bank is offering an insurance plan with up to 3.6% annual rate in collaboration with YF Life. The insurance plan is distributed by Ant Bank but is a product of YF Life, providing customers with attractive returns through insurance.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw your time deposit early with zero penalty
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalty for early withdrawal, allowing customers to access their funds when needed without financial penalties. Full withdrawal of the deposit is required (partial withdrawals not supported).

promotions.title: Direct Transfer from Libra Savings to Third-Party Accounts
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts
promotions.description: Customers can now transfer funds directly from their Libra Savings account to third-party accounts through the Ant Bank APP. The daily transfer limit has also been increased to up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Dual-Account Security Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your reserve deposits for enhanced security
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Dual-Account Security Service, an anti-fraud measure promoted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock their reserve deposits, preventing fund transfers through any channel to reduce the risk of fraudulent transactions.

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💸 Simple loan application with instant fund disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers installment loans with a simple application process and instant fund disbursement. The service features flexible loan amounts, special low interest rates, a simplified application process, and fast approval and disbursement.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit with flexible withdrawal and instant disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a revolving personal loan product where the credit limit can be reused, allowing flexible withdrawals and instant fund disbursement. Features include easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawals.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: Fund Investment with HKD 1 Minimum
promotions.highlight: 💰 Invest in funds with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank's Investment Fund Platform allows customers to invest in funds with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This low entry barrier makes investing accessible to everyone regardless of their financial capacity.

promotions.title: SGAD (Smart Guarded Account Designation) Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your standby deposits with SGAD for extra security
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Smart Guarded Account Designation (SGAD) service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock standby deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraudulent transfers.

promotions.title: Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform
promotions.highlight: 📈 New investment fund platform with global top fund companies
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform in collaboration with global top fund companies. The platform provides a comprehensive one-stop financial platform with curated quality funds for customers.

promotions.title: One-Minute Investment Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open investment account in as fast as 1 minute
promotions.description: Customers can open an investment account with Ant Bank in as little as 1 minute. The streamlined process requires no income proof and allows immediate use after account opening.
promotions.quota: Available to eligible customers aged 18 or above, not US or Canadian citizens/residents, and physically in Hong Kong when opening the account

promotions.title: HK Stocks and US Stocks Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 One-stop trading platform for Hong Kong and US stocks
promotions.description: Ant Bank provides a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, offering global investment opportunities. The platform provides access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment options.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents only (not applicable to mainland and overseas users without Hong Kong resident identity)

promotions.title: Low Minimum Time Deposit Amount
promotions.highlight: 💰 Open a time deposit with just HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank allows customers to place time deposits with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This exceptionally low entry threshold makes time deposits accessible to all customers regardless of their financial capacity.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Place time deposits in HKD and USD currencies
promotions.description: Ant Bank's time deposit service supports both Hong Kong Dollar and US Dollar deposits. This multi-currency support allows customers to diversify their time deposits across different currencies.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit No Penalty for Early Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open your account in as fast as 3 minutes!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a fast account opening experience that can take as little as 3 minutes. This feature makes it convenient for customers to open investment accounts quickly without income proof documents.

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: One-Stop Securities Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks on a single platform!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform gives access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.
promotions.cost: Trading fees apply as per service charge schedule

promotions.title: Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes with HKID and mobile number
promotions.description: Quick and convenient account opening process that can be completed in as little as 5 minutes. Customers only need to provide their Hong Kong ID card and mobile phone number to complete the registration process.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong identity card holders aged 18 or above, non-US persons only

promotions.title: Small Change Investment
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start investing with as little as HKD 1
promotions.description: Flexible savings plan that allows customers to start investing with just HKD 1. Designed to help customers save for their next adventure or personal milestone by making investing accessible with minimal initial amounts.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Instant transfers in HKD, CNY and USD within Hong Kong
promotions.description: Service that allows customers to make instant local transfers in multiple currencies including HKD, CNY, and USD. Provides flexibility for local transfers without the need for currency conversion.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Service
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone with real-time exchange rates
promotions.description: Global remittance service that enables customers to send money worldwide from their smartphone. Features real-time exchange rates for purchasing foreign currencies which can be sent overseas or used for cashless spending through payment networks.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: Fusion Bank is a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme which safeguards eligible deposits up to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor. Provides security and peace of mind for customers' savings.
promotions.quota: Maximum protection of HKD 800,000 per depositor

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Bonus Interest for Foreign Currency Exchange
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Extra interest on fixed deposits with foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: Promotion offering bonus interest rates on fixed deposits when customers exchange foreign currencies. Available for USD, HKD, and RMB exchanges with no upper limit on the exchange amount.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Special high interest rates on HKD time deposits on Mondays
promotions.description: A special time-limited promotion offering enhanced interest rates on HKD time deposits available on Mondays. Called 'Flash Monday' or 'Fusion Flash', this promotion provides better-than-standard returns on fixed deposits.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: 💰 Boosted interest rates on savings accounts
promotions.description: A promotion offering enhanced interest rates on savings accounts. Provides customers with better returns on their deposits compared to standard savings rates.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn special interest rates with no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: liviSave offers a preferential savings interest rate for customers who add funds to their account. No minimum deposit is required to enjoy this special rate, making it accessible for all customers.

promotions.title: liviSave No Fees Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. The account caters to both paying and saving needs with complete flexibility.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Fast and free transfers with FPS anytime
promotions.description: Transfer money instantly to anyone at any time using the Faster Payment System (FPS). All transfers are free of charge, allowing users to move money quickly and conveniently.

promotions.title: Secure QR Payment System
promotions.highlight: 📱 Fast and secure QR payments at merchants across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Make payments via QR code at participating merchants throughout Hong Kong. The service offers a secure, fast, and convenient shopping experience for all users.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account quickly and easily 100% online
promotions.description: Open a livi account completely online without complicated documents. The process is quick and convenient, allowing customers to join anytime, anywhere through the mobile app.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Earn rewards on everyday transactions
promotions.description: livi Rewards program offers various benefits and rewards to customers on their daily transactions. The program is designed to bring everyday delights and rewards to livi bank customers.

promotions.title: Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Comprehensive travel insurance protection
promotions.description: livi offers the Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan to provide protection during your travels. This plan covers various travel-related risks and emergencies for customers.

promotions.title: Easy HomeCare Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🏠 Protection for your home with Easy HomeCare
promotions.description: livi provides Easy HomeCare insurance plan to protect customers' homes and belongings. This insurance product offers coverage for various home-related risks and damages.

promotions.title: Pet Care Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🐾 Insurance coverage for your beloved pets
promotions.description: livi offers Pet Care insurance plan to help cover veterinary expenses and other pet-related costs. This plan provides financial protection for pet owners when caring for their furry family members.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 Flexible personal loan solutions
promotions.description: livi Flexi Loan offers personal loan options with flexible terms to meet various financial needs. The loan product provides customers with access to funds for personal expenses with customizable repayment schedules.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Flexi Balance Transfer
promotions.highlight: 💱 Transfer outstanding balances with flexible terms
promotions.description: livi offers a Balance Transfer option under their Flexi Loan product to help customers consolidate existing debts. This service allows transferring balances from other financial institutions to livi with potentially more favorable terms.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: livi Business SME Financing
promotions.highlight: 🏢 Financing solutions for small and medium enterprises
promotions.description: livi Business offers SME Financing options to help small and medium-sized businesses access capital for growth and operations. This financing solution is designed specifically for the needs of SME customers.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: BOC Chill Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Special benefits with the BOC Chill Card
promotions.description: livi offers the BOC Chill Card for customers looking for payment solutions with added benefits. This card provides various privileges and features for cardholders' everyday spending needs.

promotions.title: BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Convenient spending with BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.description: livi provides the BOC Mastercard Debit Card that allows direct access to funds in customers' accounts. This card offers worldwide acceptance and secure payment options for daily transactions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Special rewards for keeping your money safe
promotions.description: livi offers 'Money Safe Rewards' (智安存獎賞) program that provides benefits to customers for maintaining security measures. This program rewards customers for practicing safe banking habits.

promotions.title: No Minimum Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: Open and maintain a liviSave account with no minimum deposit requirement and no maintenance fees. This feature makes the account accessible to everyone regardless of their financial situation.

promotions.title: QR Cash Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: 💳 Withdraw cash using QR codes
promotions.description: livi offers a QR Cash feature that allows users to withdraw money using QR codes. This provides a convenient alternative to traditional ATM card withdrawals.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to HKD500 cash reward when paying tax with Mox Credit Card and Instalments
promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card during the promotional period and apply for Installment. This allows you to spread your tax payment while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards.

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 APR as low as 1.18% on Instant Loans with up to HKD10,888 cash reward
promotions.description: Get a Tax Season Instant Loan with APR as low as 1.18%. Apply through the Mox app for a personalized quotation and instant disbursement. Earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward for successful application of designated Instant Loans.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Up to HKD80 off when ordering on Keeta with Mox Card
promotions.description: Order on Keeta with your Mox Card and enjoy a Mox exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Additional surprise vouchers and welcome rewards available.

promotions.title: Mox x Xiaomi Flagship Camera Phone Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% interest instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with your Mox Credit Card to unlock up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack, total rewards can reach 7%.
promotions.quota: New customers get up to HKD2,150 cash bonus with invitation code XM1500MOX

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Scratch to win up to HKD8,888 in rewards by completing missions
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card with instant prizes. Complete more missions to multiply chances of winning the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 in Solana + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch' with every HKD10,000 deposit
promotions.description: Deposit your bonus into Mox to earn interest plus a chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch'. For every HKD10,000 deposited, get one entry into the lucky draw, increasing chances with higher deposits.
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD10,000 deposit for one lucky draw entry

promotions.title: Mox x csl Best-in-Town Exclusive Plan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🤳 Get up to HKD1,380 rebates + free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack with csl plans
promotions.description: Sign up for a new csl plan or renew your existing one with Mox Credit Card autopay to enjoy HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.
promotions.cost: Sign up for csl plan with Mox Credit Card autopay

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Insurance Promotion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ FREE add-on coverage with Travel Pick & Go insurance purchase
promotions.description: Apply for Travel Pick & Go insurance and receive 1 FREE add-on coverage during the promotion period. This offer helps safeguard your trip from financial stress due to unexpected events.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Travel Pick & Go insurance required

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving with invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL'
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving - enough for a round-trip flight to Asia.
promotions.cost: Spending and saving requirements (details not specified)

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club
promotions.highlight: 📱 HKD100 off the new Samsung S26 series at The Club
promotions.description: Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with your Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount on the new Samsung S26 series. This is in addition to up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD1,800 at The Club required

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Spending Reward
promotions.highlight: 🚕 Up to HKD90 off Uber Taxi rides when paying with Mox Card
promotions.description: Enjoy HKD10 off each Uber Taxi ride per month when paying with your Mox Card during the promotional period. Ideal for visiting family, weekend outings, or catching flights.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Invitation Code Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with HKD250,000 time deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO' and complete account opening within 15 days. Place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days and maintain it until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: Only for customers who have not held any Mox Account in the past 12 months

promotions.title: MOXSMART Double Rewards Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 20% cash rebate from spending across 5 hot merchants plus savings rewards
promotions.description: New Mox customers who enter invitation code 'MOXSMART' when signing up can earn 20% cash rebate by spending on favorite merchants including HKTVmall, foodpanda, Uber, Keeta, or Taobao. Additional rewards available from savings.

promotions.title: Trip.com Year-Round Exclusive Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% off on Trip.com plus up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Enjoy up to 8% off on Trip.com bookings when using Mox Credit Card. In addition, earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on these purchases all year long.

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Premium Rebate
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Enjoy up to 2 months of premium rebate with Personal Accident Cushion
promotions.description: Purchase Mox's Personal Accident Cushion insurance and receive up to 2 months of premium rebate. This double reward offer provides protection while offering financial benefits.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Personal Accident Cushion insurance required

promotions.title: Payroll with Mox Top-up Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💸 Top up 1.5% p.a. on savings & Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit
promotions.description: Set up payroll with Mox to receive an additional 1.5% p.a. interest rate on savings plus Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit Card spending. Available as an ongoing feature for customers who set up direct payroll deposit.

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Stack wins, stack rates – up to 3.5% p.a. on your deposit!
promotions.description: Complete missions to earn higher interest rates on your deposits. Stack multiple wins to achieve up to 3.5% p.a. interest rate on your deposit.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 🎉 Earn HKD300 cash reward for each successful referral, with no limit
promotions.description: Share your referral code with friends to invite them to open a Mox account. Both referrer and referee earn HKD300 cash reward when the referee successfully opens an account and completes HKD1,000 in eligible transactions with their Mox Credit Card.
promotions.cost: Referee must complete HKD1,000 eligible spending with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Exclusive year-round deals on The Club platform
promotions.description: Access Mox Zone on The Club platform to enjoy exclusive year-round deals and discounts. Special offers available only to Mox customers for enhanced shopping value throughout the year.

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Place a Time Deposit with Mox to earn Asia Miles in addition to interest. This ongoing feature allows customers to accumulate travel miles while growing their savings.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings
promotions.highlight: 💰 Unmatched flexibility and competitive rates with FlexiBoost savings
promotions.description: Enjoy flexible savings with competitive interest rates through Mox's FlexiBoost savings feature. This offers customers both the flexibility they need and attractive returns on their savings.

promotions.title: New FX Users Reward
promotions.highlight: 💱 New FX users get up to HKD175 cash rewards
promotions.description: New users of Mox FX service can earn up to HKD175 in cash rewards. This promotion encourages customers to try Mox's foreign exchange services with a financial incentive.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ For all spending HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Earn 1 mile for every HKD4 spent with your Mox Credit Card with no earning limits. Additionally, enjoy 0% foreign exchange fees on international purchases, making this ideal for travelers.

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Enjoy unlimited CashBack on all purchases with no restrictions
promotions.description: Earn unlimited CashBack on all purchases made with your Mox Credit Card with no category restrictions or earning caps. This ongoing benefit provides consistent rewards on every transaction.
promotions.cost: Spending with Mox Credit Card required

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards
promotions.description: Shop at HKT with your Mox Card to earn HKD1,400 in Cash Rewards. This limited-time promotion offers substantial rewards for shopping at HKT stores.

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Say goodbye to waiting and hello to instant earnings on deposits!
promotions.description: Enjoy instant earnings on your deposits with Mox. Unlike traditional banks that make you wait for interest, Mox provides immediate earnings on your deposited funds.

promotions.title: 1500MOX New Customer Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to HKD1,500 cash reward plus 0-requirement access to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements at any merchant in Hong Kong. For a limited time, unlock 2% Unlimited CashBack or HKD4=1 mile with no balance requirement.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers who haven't held any Mox Account in 12 months
promotions.cost: Minimum Time Deposit of HKD250,000 required

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: Pay your HKT bills and earn HKD1,200 cash rewards plus up to 2% Unlimited CashBack. Specific requirements and eligibility period are not detailed in the source.

promotions.title: CLUBLINK New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'CLUBLINK' to enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400. Specific requirements and rewards breakdown are not fully detailed in the source.

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💳 0% interest* on Instant Clear for credit card balance transfers
promotions.description: Clear your external credit card bills from other banks or financial institutions with Instant Clear and save as much as 94% interest charges. The process takes only a few minutes and offers 0% interest options.

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Investment Account Opening for Existing Customers
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Open an account in as fast as 3 minutes with no minimum balance
promotions.description: Customers can open a bank account in as fast as 3 minutes without any minimum balance requirement. This feature is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 Bank with zero minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: PAObank offers accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Customers can maintain their accounts without worrying about meeting minimum balance thresholds or incurring related fees.

promotions.title: 24/7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: 🕗 Access all banking services 24/7 through a single app
promotions.description: Customers can access complete banking services including deposits, transfers, cross-border payments, and FX 24 hours a day, 7 days a week through the Ping An Digital Bank app.

promotions.title: Services for Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Banking services available for Hong Kong visitors
promotions.description: PAObank offers banking services for visiting customers who are physically present in Hong Kong. This allows tourists and temporary visitors to access banking services during their stay in Hong Kong.
promotions.quota: Available to visitors physically present in Hong Kong

promotions.title: Low Investment Threshold for Money Market Funds
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero fees for money market fund subscriptions and redemptions
promotions.description: Customers can subscribe to and redeem money market funds with zero transaction fees. Funds can be redeemed as quickly as the same day with a low investment threshold of just HKD100.

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Trade Hong Kong stocks with zero platform fees
promotions.description: Investors can trade Hong Kong stocks with 0 platform fees and real-time index data. Commission is 0.15% with a minimum fee of HKD50 per transaction.

promotions.title: Extended US Stock Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Trade US stocks up to 16 hours daily with advanced analytics
promotions.description: Investors can trade US stocks during pre-market, regular market, and after-hours sessions, providing a total trading window of 16 hours. Commission is USD 0.012 per share with a minimum fee of USD7.88 per transaction.
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share (minimum USD7.88 per transaction)

promotions.title: Free LV1 Real-time Hong Kong Stock Quotes
promotions.highlight: 📊 Unlimited free real-time Level 1 stock quotes
promotions.description: Investors who have activated stock investment services can access unlimited free real-time Level 1 stock market data for both Hong Kong and US stocks, helping them make timely investment decisions.
promotions.quota: Available to customers who have activated stock investment services

promotions.title: Mixed and Equity Funds 1% Subscription Fee
promotions.highlight: 🏦 Low subscription fees for various fund types
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy discounted subscription fees for various fund types: 0.5% for bond funds and 1% for mixed and equity funds. This makes fund investments more accessible with lower entry costs.
promotions.cost: 0.5% for bond funds, 1% for mixed and equity funds

promotions.title: Same-Day Money Market Fund Redemption
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Get your money back as soon as same day when redeeming money market funds
promotions.description: Fast redemption service for money market funds with funds credited to the customer's bank account as quickly as the same day. Provides high liquidity for money market investments.

promotions.title: US Stock Trading Fixed Commission
promotions.highlight: 🇺🇸 Trade US stocks for just USD 0.012 per share
promotions.description: PAObank offers US stock trading with a competitive commission of USD 0.012 per share with a minimum charge of USD 7.88 per trade. There are no additional platform fees, providing transparent pricing for US stock investors.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share (minimum USD 7.88 per trade)

promotions.title: System Upgrade Notice
promotions.highlight: ⚠️ Scheduled maintenance affecting mobile banking and customer services
promotions.description: The bank will perform system upgrades and maintenance from 01:30am to 06:30am on August 9, 2020. During this period, mobile banking and customer services may be impacted.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Best Exchange Rates
promotions.highlight: 💱 Enjoy the best FX rates in town with no markup
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers the best exchange rates in town for 10 major foreign currencies. Rates are based on WeLab Bank's cost price without any markup when converting HKD to foreign currencies.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card Zero Foreign Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 🌏 $0 foreign transaction fees on overseas spending
promotions.description: Enjoy zero foreign transaction fees when using the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card for transactions in 10 supported currencies including JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF and NZD.

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw & Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Win travel vouchers and enjoy up to 3% overseas spending cashback
promotions.description: Spend with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card during the promotion period to earn lucky draw chances. 300 prizes including HKD 1,000 travel vouchers are up for grabs, plus enjoy up to 3% cashback on overseas spending.
promotions.cost: At least one eligible spending transaction per lucky draw round

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Overseas Spending Cashback
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to 3% cashback on overseas spending and 0.2% on local spending
promotions.description: Earn up to 3% cashback on overseas spending and up to 0.2% on local spending with the WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Cashback will be automatically credited to the core account by May 31, 2026.
promotions.quota: Maximum HKD 50 or equivalent per eligible transaction

promotions.title: WeLab Bank New Customer 2-in-1 Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Earn up to HKD 5,000 in cash rewards
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy dual welcome offers: 4% p.a. time deposit interest rate and up to HKD 4,000 investment fund cash rewards, totaling around HKD 5,000 in rewards.

promotions.title: First-time Foreign Currency Exchange Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 Get HKD 50 cashback on your first FX transaction
promotions.description: New foreign currency exchange customers who exchange HKD 20,000 or more for any of 10 designated popular currencies in a single transaction can enjoy HKD 50 cashback on their first exchange.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come first served; one-time per eligible customer

promotions.title: Featured Funds $0 Subscription and Switching Fee
promotions.highlight: 💰 $0 subscription and switching fees on all fund investments
promotions.description: Invest in over 170 funds from 11 leading fund companies with zero subscription and switching fees. This allows flexible allocation of funds to build diversified passive income streams.
promotions.cost: Monthly platform fee of 0.1% on total fund holdings

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🤖 AI-powered personalized investment portfolio recommendations
promotions.description: In partnership with Allianz Global Investors, WeLab Bank's Digital Wealth Advisory service provides personalized fund portfolio recommendations based on investment objectives and personal circumstances with automated alerts to track investment progress.

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Save up to HKD 500 on Trip.com bookings
promotions.description: During the promotion period, book designated products on Trip.com Hong Kong website or mobile app using WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card and enter the specified promo code to enjoy up to HKD 500 discount on eligible bookings.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come first served

promotions.title: Tesla Customer Personal Instalment Loan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Special 4.55% APR on personal loans for Tesla owners
promotions.description: Tesla customers can enjoy a preferential annual percentage rate as low as 4.55% on personal installment loans. Open a WeLab Bank account or apply for a loan with promo code 'TESLA5' and provide Tesla vehicle subscription proof to qualify.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come first served; Tesla owners only

promotions.title: Extra Lucky Draw Chances for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🎲 New customers receive 50 additional lucky draw entries
promotions.description: New customers receive 50 additional lucky draw entries for the Easter Lucky Draw promotion when using the Global Wallet Debit Card for overseas spending. They'll also enjoy 3% cash rebate on overseas spending and automatic participation in the lucky draw.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Cash Rebate Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get up to HKD 23,888 cash rebate on personal loans
promotions.description: Customers who successfully apply for a personal loan with an approved amount of HKD 150,001 or above and a repayment period of 24 months or more, and withdraw the loan within 7 days of approval, can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 23,888.
promotions.cost: Minimum loan amount of HKD 150,001, minimum 24-month repayment period

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Referral Rewards for Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 👫 Earn HKD 800 for each successful loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can earn HKD 800 cash reward for each friend or family member who successfully applies for a WeLab Bank personal loan using their referral code and draws down the loan within 7 days of approval.
promotions.quota: Maximum HKD 8,000 per customer (10 successful referrals)

promotions.title: Investment Fund Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💹 Earn up to HKD 4,000 cash reward on fund investments
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy up to HKD 4,000 cash reward on eligible fund transactions. The reward amount is based on the cumulative eligible fund transaction amount.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank 4% p.a. GoSave 2.0 Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💵 Enjoy 4% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can place HKD GoSave 2.0 time deposits at 4% annual interest rate. This is part of the 2-in-1 Welcome Offer for new customers.

promotions.title: WeLab Money Plus Investment Service
promotions.highlight: 📊 Low-risk money market fund with same-day settlement
promotions.description: WeLab Money Plus offers money market funds with same-day settlement when instructions are submitted before 9am HKT. Aims for returns similar to time deposits but without lock-in periods.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 👥 Earn HKD800 for each successful personal loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can refer friends or relatives to apply for a WeLab Bank personal loan using their referral code. For each successful referral who draws down the loan within 7 days of approval, the referrer receives HKD800 cash reward.
promotions.quota: Maximum 10 successful referrals (HKD8,000) per customer during promotion period

promotions.title: 0.1% Monthly Fund Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 💼 Low 0.1% monthly fee instead of traditional subscription fees
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a uniform monthly fee of 0.1% based on the total value of selected funds, helping customers save nearly 85% in transaction fees compared to traditional subscription fee models. This allows for unlimited trading and portfolio adjustments.
promotions.cost: 0.1% monthly platform fee based on fund value

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 💹 0% subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: ZA Bank users who have activated fund trading services can enjoy 0% fund subscription fee offer and redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows 100% of investors' money to go directly into the market without subscription fees.
promotions.quota: All users with activated fund trading services

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Earn up to HKD 90,000 in cash rewards for referrals
promotions.description: Refer friends to open ZA Bank accounts and earn various cash rewards. Top 20 referrers with most successful referrals in each phase can earn up to HKD 10,000. Additional rewards available when referred friends meet deposit or multi-product requirements.
promotions.quota: All existing ZA Bank customers eligible to refer

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth HKD 2,026 for new customers via referral
promotions.description: New customers who open an account using a referral code can receive a package of rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund holding rebate coupons (HKD 780 + HKD 20), stock cash rebate coupons, currency exchange discount, and overseas remittance cashback.
promotions.quota: New customers who open account with referral code

promotions.title: StockBack x ZA Card Reward Program
promotions.highlight: 💰 Get stocks instead of points with your card spending
promotions.description: Hong Kong's first program that rewards card spending with actual stock shares. For each eligible transaction of at least HKD 10, customers can choose one stock from six options displayed in the StockBack machine and receive 1% of transaction value in shares.
promotions.cost: Minimum spend of HKD 10 per transaction

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Exclusive travel discounts and offers year-round
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers year-round travel promotions for cardholders, including special rates and discounts on hotels, flights, and other travel-related expenses. These offers provide added value for customers who travel frequently.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Hold 11 different currencies in one account
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a multi-currency savings account that allows customers to hold 11 different currencies including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF. This makes currency management and international transactions more convenient.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💳 Free cash withdrawals at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong
promotions.description: ZA Card holders can withdraw cash for free at more than 3,000 Visa ATMs throughout Hong Kong. This service allows customers to access their funds without incurring ATM withdrawal fees that are common with other banks.

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for first 90 days after account opening
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy $0 platform fee for cryptocurrency trading for the first 90 days after opening an account. This allows new users to trade crypto 24/7 directly with their HKD or USD deposits without platform fees during the initial period.

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Choose the last 6 digits of your card number
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to personalize their debit card by choosing the last 6 digits of their card number. This unique feature lets customers create a more memorable or meaningful card number.

promotions.title: ZA Bank FPS Free Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Free instant transfers to other banks via FPS
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers free instant transfers to other banks via the Faster Payment System (FPS). Customers can send and receive HKD and CNY using just their mobile phone number, with no transfer fees charged by ZA Bank.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: 🕗 Banking services available 24/7, no matter the time of day
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides around-the-clock banking services, allowing customers to access and manage their finances anytime. This includes 24x7 customer service support for assistance with banking needs.
promotions.quota: Available to all ZA Bank customers

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 brokerage, 0 custody fees for stock trading
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers zero commission stock trading with no custody fees. Platform fees are as low as USD 1.99 for US stocks or HKD 18 per transaction for Hong Kong stocks, making stock trading more affordable compared to traditional brokers.
promotions.quota: All users with activated stock trading services
promotions.cost: Platform fee only (no commission or custody fees)

promotions.title: ZA Card PowerDraw
promotions.highlight: 🎰 Win up to 200% rebate on card spending
promotions.description: With ZA Card PowerDraw, customers have a chance to win up to 200% rebate on their card spending. The promotion allows customers to participate in a drawing mechanism to potentially multiply their rewards on eligible transactions.

promotions.title: Loan Approval in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Get loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a fast loan approval process that can provide results in as little as 90 seconds. Loan amounts up to HKD 1,000,000 are available with annualized percentage rates as low as 1.30%, providing quick access to funds when needed.

promotions.title: HKD 1,000 Stock Purchase Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate on stock purchases
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate on stock purchases. After successfully opening a ZA Bank account, eligible customers can claim stock cash rebate vouchers from ZA Quest and use them for qualifying stock transactions.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: ZA Bank Account Opening in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as little as 2 minutes online
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined digital account opening process that allows both Hong Kong residents and visitors to open an account in as fast as 2 minutes. No minimum deposit is required to open an account.

promotions.title: Zero Fee SWIFT Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Transfer to 140+ countries with no ZA Bank fee
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers can send money directly to over 140 countries and regions via SWIFT with zero fees charged by ZA Bank. This service makes international transfers more affordable compared to traditional banks that typically charge high fees.

promotions.title: HKD 500 New Account Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💰 Up to HKD 500 cash reward for new account opening
promotions.description: New customers can receive up to HKD 500 cash reward when opening a new account with ZA Bank. This offer is available for selected customers who complete specific tasks in ZA Quest after successful account opening.

promotions.title: Refer a Friend Account Opening Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🤝 Earn up to HKD 90,000 by referring friends to open accounts
promotions.description: Customers can earn rewards by referring friends to open ZA Bank accounts. During the promotion period, the top 20 referrers with the most successful referrals in each of 9 phases can receive up to HKD 10,000 cash rewards per phase, with a potential total of up to HKD 90,000.
promotions.quota: Top 20 referrers in each of 9 phases

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Referred New Customers
promotions.highlight: 💹 Enjoy 20% p.a. interest on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers who open accounts using a referral code and deposit at least HKD 1,000 from external accounts within 14 days can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD new fund time deposit interest rate booster coupon, bringing the total rate to 20% p.a. with the base rate.
promotions.quota: New referred customers meeting deposit requirements

promotions.title: Second 20% p.a. Time Deposit for Multi-Product Usage
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Additional 20% p.a. time deposit for using multiple products
promotions.description: New referred customers who hold deposits, funds, and stocks with a total balance of at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of opening an account can receive an additional +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon, providing a second opportunity to enjoy 20% p.a. interest.
promotions.quota: New referred customers using multiple products

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for Meeting Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💹 New users can enjoy 20% p.a. interest rate on 7-day HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers referred through the referral program can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate bonus coupon, which combined with the base rate offers a total of 20% p.a. interest rate. Additional coupons can be earned by meeting specified requirements.
promotions.cost: Must be referred through program and meet deposit requirements

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 No annual fees or hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Bank's Visa debit card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges, providing a cost-effective payment solution. The card supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient digital payments.

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 HKD payments with express remittance by Wise arrive faster than standard transfers
promotions.description: ZA Bank partners with Wise to provide express remittance services, allowing HKD payments to arrive faster than standard international transfers. This service enables quicker cross-border payments for users.

promotions.title: Insurance in 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Get insured in as fast as 3 minutes via your smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, users can complete insurance applications in as little as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).
